title: Hoffen's Bakery
description: 25+ New custom food pastry recipes and cosmetics, enriching the vanilla experience.
body:
## Welcome!

🥐 Hoffen's Bakery is a vanilla plus datapack that introduces **27 new pastry recipes** and cosmetics to the game and restores your whimsy.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3_koD3Q8Zmw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Contents

<details>
<summary>🍞 Pastries</summary>

- 🍞 Pastries
    - Alfajor 
    - Apple pie
    - Berry pie
    - Carrot cake
    - Chorusfruit pie (Teleports great distance when eaten)
    - Churro
    - Concha
    - Croissant
    - Donut
    - Éclair
    - Empanada
    - Fruit tart
    - Glowberry pie (Couple seconds of Glowing when eaten)
    - Honey puff
    - Lava cake
    - Macaron
    - Mille feuille
    - Mooncake
    - Paczek
    - Poppy seed roll
    - Princess cake
    - Sable
    - Sugar cube (Couple seconds of Speed when eaten)
    - Taiyaki
    - Turkish delight
    - Ginger cookie
    - Wienerbrod (Teleports great distance when eaten)
    - Butter (Edible, but not recommended to eat)

Saturation and hunger points given by each pastry vary between those of golden carrots or cooked meat. Details are specified in the **Baking Cookbook**

_Note: This datapack repurposes the ´poisonous_potato´ item for some functions, when installing this datapack previous existing items will be retextured and potato crops will no longer have a chance to drop a poisonous potato, additionaly, the item will not appear on shipwreck loot._

</details>



<details>
<summary>⭐ Cosmetics</summary>

- ⭐ Cosmetics
    - Plain hankerchief hat (Available in 14 different colors, prevents from burning*)
    - Floral hankerchief hat (Available in 14 different colors, prevents from burning*)
    - Plaid hankerchief hat (Available in 14 different colors, prevents from burning*)
    - Chef hat (Hidden recipe, available only in white color, prevents from burning*)
    - Baking whisk (Brush)
    - Baking pin (Wooden sword with knockback IV)
    - Bread bag (Custom bundle)
  
** They prevent from burning, but you can still take fire damage

</details>



<details>
<summary>📔 Baking Cookbook</summary>


- 📔 Baking Cookbook
    - Illustrated book with recipes for all obtainable items
    - Obtain it by baking a book (Smelting a book on a furnace) 👨‍🍳 


</details>

<details>
<summary>🏆 Advancements</summary>


- 🏆 Advancements
    - **[Quasó]** | Craft a Croissant using wheat and butter
    - **[Sweet Knowledge]** | Obtain a Baking Cookbook
    - **[Dressed for the Ocassion]** | Obtain a Hankerchief
    - **[The Great Minecraft Bake Off]** | Craft every pastry recipe
 

 Advancements are designed so each one explore a different feature of the datapack!

</details>



## How to Install
- Head over to **Versions**
- Click on the **Name** of your preferred version
- Scroll down to see the **datapack file** and the **resourcepack file**
- Download **both** of them
- Install **hoffens_bakery_rp** on your resourcepack folder !!
- Install **hoffens_bakery** on your datapacks folder !!

- Start exploring the pastries by smelting a book on a furnace


 ![screenshot of the two files needed for the datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d97c2c68436c5d973624a04c63f25608aadfdaa.png)

## FAQ 

<details>
<summary>Frequently Asked Questions</summary>

- **Textures not loading / The threatening magenta cube**

Make sure you installed the resource pack correctly, the .zip file should be in your resourcepacks folder and loaded (%appdata% > .minecraft > resourcepacks) The file is named hoffens_bakery_**rp**_[version]

- **Datapack not loading / Crafting items don't give result**

Make sure you loaded into the datapacks folder of your world or server (.minecraft > saves > [Your World] > datapacks ) The file is named hoffens_bakery_[version] 

- **Compatibility with other Mods / Datapacks**

Compatibility with other projects was **NOT** tested, feel free to report incompatibilities via the Issue Tracker link.
  
- **[Item] isn't working as intended**

If a food or item isn't doing what it says it does please report it via the Issue Tracker link. 

- **Balancing concerns**

If you feel like if a food needs to be nerfed/buffed for a more pleasent vanilla experience, quality of life improvements etc, feel free to share your feedback via the Issue Tracker link.

- **Bedrock port**

There are no current plans to port this to Bedrock.

- **Translations**

I'll keep an eye on that for future updates. 

</details>



## Don't forget!
